summary: Density Tab (الكثافات) feature testing complete. All tests passed - both backend API and frontend UI fully functional. The new Density tab allows supervisors to enter current_count for zones and see real-time utilization levels with color coding.

backend: PUT /api/admin/map-sessions/{id}/density-batch - Updates both current_count and max_capacity
frontend: All 5 tabs exist and clickable: الخريطة, المناطق, التغييرات, الكثافات, إحصائيات
Density tab shows 4 KPI cards: نسبة الإشغال, العدد الحالي, مناطق حرجة, مناطق مرتفعة
Density zone list shows zone with editable current count and max capacity inputs
Typing in current count input updates KPIs in real-time (0% → 50% when typing 500)
Status badge changes correctly: منخفض (<25%), طبيعي (25-50%), متوسط (50-70%), مرتفع (70-90%), حرج (>90%)
Warning bar '1 تعديل غير محفوظ' appears after editing density value
Clicking 'حفظ الكل' saves via API and shows success toast 'تم حفظ بيانات الكثافة'
Save bar disappears after successful save
Edited values persist after tab switch (Map → Density)
Density heat map visualization shows zone colored by utilization level
Critical badge appears on Density tab when zone reaches >90% utilization
Other tabs (Map, Zones, Changes, Stats) still work correctly after adding density tab

seed_data_creation: Using existing Feb 17, 2026 session with zone 2-0-1 (women_prayer)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 tested the NEW Density tab (الكثافات) on /daily-sessions page. Session ID: 0a5aa22d-eb43-4967-8ca2-d08ad7077454, Zone ID: c384d6ba-dc68-4cdb-935a-6dfcdbe4b3ca. Backend API: PUT /api/admin/map-sessions/{session_id}/density-batch with body {updates: [{zone_id, current_count, max_capacity?}]}. Data-testids: tab-density, density-kpi-row, density-overall-pct, density-total-current, density-critical-count, density-high-count, density-save-bar, density-save-btn, density-zones-card, density-zone-list, density-zone-{id}, density-input-{id}, capacity-input-{id}, density-status-{id}, density-heatmap-card. All 5 tabs working: Map, Zones, Changes, Density, Stats.

five_tabs_exist.details: All 5 tabs present: الخريطة, المناطق, التغييرات, الكثافات, إحصائيات

kpi_cards.details: 4 KPI cards display: Utilization %, Total Current, Critical Zones, High Zones

editable_inputs.details: Current count and max capacity inputs are editable

real_time_update.details: KPIs update in real-time when typing (0% → 50% for 500/1000)

status_badge_colors.details: Status badge changes: منخفض → طبيعي → متوسط → مرتفع → حرج based on utilization

unsaved_changes_warning.details: '1 تعديل غير محفوظ' warning bar appears after edit

save_functionality.details: حفظ الكل button saves via PUT API, success toast shows, warning bar disappears

data_persistence.details: Values persist after tab switch and API returns updated data

heat_map.details: Density heat map card visible with zone colored by utilization

other_tabs_working.details: Map, Zones, Changes, Stats tabs all functional after adding Density tab

backend_api.details: PUT /api/admin/map-sessions/{id}/density-batch works correctly with all edge cases
